system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_govan_thekho_print","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_TONKHO_GOVAN_THEKHO_PRINT]
(
	@nam int ,
	@thang int ,
	@dayy float ,
	@rong float ,
	@dai float ,
	@mact nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN
	--DECLARE @nam int = 2025;
	--DECLARE @thang int = 2;
	--DECLARE @dayy float = 28;
	--DECLARE @rong float = 105;
	--DECLARE @dai float = 2500;
	--DECLARE @mact nvarchar(50) = 'THONG';
	SELECT phanloai, ngaythang, nhacc, tenct, tenkhoahoc, sochungtu, lenhsanxuat, fsc_name, tieuchuan_phoi, malo_nguyenlieu,
		dayy, rong, dai,
		SUM(sothanh) AS sothanh,
		SUM(sokhoi) AS sokhoi,
		ghichu = CASE phanloai
					WHEN N'NHAP' THEN N'NHẬP'
					WHEN N'XUAT' THEN N'XUẤT'
					WHEN N'DIEUCHINH' THEN N'ĐIỀU CHỈNH'
				 END
	FROM (
	SELECT CONVERT(date, A.ngaytao) as ngaythang,
		A.nhacc, A.mact, B.tenct, B.tenkhoahoc,
		A.lenhsanxuat, A.sochungtu,
		B.tinhtrang_fsc, FSC.fsc_name, 
		B.chatluong, TC.tieuchuan_phoi,
		C.malo_nguyenlieu, 
		A.dayy, A.rong, A.dai, A.sothanh,
		sokhoi = (A.dayy * A.rong * A.dai * A.sothanh) / 1000000000,
		A.phanloai
	FROM tr_tonkho_govan_giaodich A
		INNER JOIN tr_tonkho_govan B ON A.idTonKho = B.id
		INNER JOIN tr_tonkho_govan_malo C ON B.malo_id = C.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_tinhtrang_fsc FSC ON B.tinhtrang_fsc = FSC.fsc_id
		LEFT JOIN tr_loai_tieuchuan_phoi TC ON B.chatluong = TC.id
	WHERE A.mact = @mact
		AND A.dayy = @dayy AND A.rong = @rong AND A.dai = @dai
		AND YEAR(A.ngaytao) = @nam AND MONTH(A.ngaytao) = @thang
	--ORDER BY A.ngaytao DESC
	) A
	GROUP BY phanloai, ngaythang, nhacc, tenct, tenkhoahoc, sochungtu, lenhsanxuat, fsc_name, tieuchuan_phoi, malo_nguyenlieu, dayy, rong, dai
	ORDER BY ngaythang, phanloai, malo_nguyenlieu
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_loai_tieuchuan_phoi","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc","dbo.tr_tonkho_govan","dbo.tr_tonkho_govan_giaodich","dbo.tr_tonkho_govan_malo"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
